sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8148" key="a)ne/kkritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέκ-κρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not emptied,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαστήρ</foreign> Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deherb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
